THE PRO TEM JUDGE HEARS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY COUNSEL HILLIARD AND BY PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT ALLEN HAMPEL AND ALSO RECEIVES, READS AND REVIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED THIS DAY.

THEREUPON, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. ALL DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED THIS DAY RETURNED.
